'''pawufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:arachidonylethanolamide|arachidonylethanolamide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:arachidonylethanolamide|arachidonylethanolamide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pawufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || pæwifith || pæwifij || pæwifish || pæwifi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || pawuwufuth || pawuwufuj || pawuwufush || pawuwufu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || pawufuth || pawufuj || pawufush || pawufu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || pawuffufth || pawuffufj || pawuffufsh || pawuffuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || pawufuthu || pawufuju || pawufushu || pawufuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || pawufuth || pawufuj || pawufush || pawufu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || pawufuthul || pawufujul || pawufushul || pawufukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || pawufuuthuthu || pawufuujuju || pawufuushushu || pawufuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || pawufuthun || pawufujun || pawufushun || pawufukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || pawufuthuoro || pawufujuoro || pawufushuoro || pawufukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
